Syntax errors in hand-written main-package files surface at wire time.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(; err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: main.go:4:16: expected operand, found ';'
error: main.go:7:3: expected ')', found 'EOF'
error: main.go:7:3: expected ';', found 'EOF'
error: main.go:7:3: expected '{', found 'EOF'
error: main.go:7:3: expected '}', found 'EOF'
error: main.go:7:3: expected operand, found 'EOF'
error: main.go:7:3: missing ',' in argument list
